_: The update card's changelog. Newest first. Each entry: build (the stamp it shipped as), title, notes. newsSince() shows entries until it meets the running build — keep this list short and honest.

entries.title: Smart self-updating
notes: updates now arrive by themselves — no more clearing site data
the Update button wears a badge and opens this log
choose: now, after this track, or later (6 h)
⚡ SHOW mode is never interrupted by an update

entries.title: The epic touch
notes: hold to charge, release to detonate
sling the vortex and it keeps spinning
tap on the beat — the field answers louder
✦ AUTO: scenes re-tune your touch as they change

entries.title: Echoes — passing thoughts
notes: quotes drift by like clouds in the calm passages
✧ MUSE floats questions you can answer, kept on this device only

entries.title: Power modes
notes: ⚡ SHOW: full density, screen kept awake
⚡ ECO: half the frames, quarter the pixels — battery goes to the music

entries.title: Mobile booth redesign
notes: real platters on mobile, a live monitor between them
